category_sources: source_facts.description says it packs, ships, and runs applications as lightweight containers and includes the daemon.
source_facts.repo is moby/moby, the source project for Docker Engine components.

docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is Docker's official site; the official Docker Engine docs are under docs.docker.com/engine/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/moby/moby, so repository was not re-determined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes a lightweight container engine daemon.
